title: selaginella calostachya
intro: Selaginella calostachya, also known as the black spored resurrection fern or spore fern, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its ability to revive itself after drying out by releasing water from its spores. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella calostachya are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella calostachya can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
